Hi, I'm Moritz Fieler. A UX Strategist and Frontend Developer creating modular, user-centered digital ecosystems.

Selected Projects.

A showcase of strategy, design, and implementation.

01 / Client Web Project

Paquita Pilates — Website & Booking Platform

An instructor with deep expertise and a down-to-earth teaching style — but a digital presence falling behind. For paquitapilatesreformer.com, I developed brand identity, UX architecture, and a custom booking system that feels as personal as walking through her studio door.

Web DesignDevelopmentBooking System
02 / Academic Project

HIQER — Persuasion for the Outdoors

What if your phone made you put your phone away? HIQER turns outdoor exploration into a competitive quest — GPS triggers, XP, leaderboards, and a companion Watch app designed so the screen stays in your pocket.

UX DesignGamificationPersuasive Design
03 / Sustainable Platform

Kischde — Trade Within Trust

No marketplace noise. No strangers. Just a circle of people you trust — and the things you no longer need. Kischde is a swipe-first trading app built on the belief that giving should feel better than selling.

Vue.js & IonicMongoDBUX System
04 / Interdisciplinary Academic Project

B.E.A.S.T. — Charging with Character for Mercedes-AMG

How do you bring heartbeat back to electric vehicles? In a Winter 2022/23 interdisciplinary project, our HdM Stuttgart team collaborated with Mercedes-AMG to prototype multimodal charging experiences — light, haptics, and sound — validated through real user testing in the Mobile Lab.

UX ResearchMultisensory DesignHaptics
05 / Bachelor Thesis with Mercedes-Benz

Connected E-Mobility — One Ecosystem, One Interface

What if your car, wallbox, solar panels, and home grid finally spoke the same language? My bachelor thesis (graded 1.0) developed a connected e-mobility interface giving Mercedes customers the unified control their ecosystem deserves.

UI ConceptIoT EcosystemInteraction Design

Core Expertise

Connecting research, design, and robust code.

UX Design & Research

Research-backed concept generation. Transforming user needs and data into seamless, persuasive interfaces.

FigmaPrototypingThink-AloudUEQ

Frontend Development

Clean, modular technical implementation of design systems. Building fast, responsive, and maintainable applications.

Vue.jsNuxtIonicTypeScript

Backend & Systems

Bridging the gap between front-end UI and server architecture to ensure end-to-end functionality and performance.

Node.jsMongoDBREST APIsGit
